name: ReleaseOps
description: Read-only release and deploy triage tools for GitHub Actions.

githubTokenEnv.description: Environment variable that contains a GitHub token. Defaults to GITHUB_TOKEN.

defaultRepo.description: Default GitHub repository in owner/name form.

defaultWorkflow.description: Default workflow id or workflow file name.

defaultBranch.description: Default branch to inspect when no run id is provided.

runbookPath.description: Optional local markdown runbook path used to seed rollback checklist output.
